attempts.insight: Structure laid down. Two specific risks documented: (1) `intro` semantics on `let`/`letI` conclusion may fail if elaborator beta-reduces lets first; recovery is to drop `intro` and use `simp only` to unfold or call `intros r y` after lets reduce. (2) `Pi.smul_apply` firing depends on `[∀ i, SMul R (Z₂ i)]` synthesis from `perI₂`; recovery is `letI := perI₂` before the simp.

Estimated ~40-60 LOC.
